content_fingerprint: llama cpp shifts default quantization from q5 1 to q8 0 in release b8929 the llama cpp project has changed its default model quantization format from q5 1 to the higher fidelity q8 0 a shift that affects any tool relying on the library s default quantization settings release b8929 of llama cpp published on april 25 2026 introduces a change to the project s default quantization parameter used during model conversion the llama model quantize params function now defaults to llama ftype mostly q8 0 instead of the previous llama ftype mostly q5 1 a switch driven by pull request 20828 the developers
